boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Will Call is located in Parking Lots B, G, N, and P.

KovZpa2W1e.parkingDetail: Parking lots open 2 hours before game time.

generalInfo.generalRule: THE FOLLOWING ITEMS ARE PROHIBITED FROM ENTERING THE STADIUM: PURSES/BAGS/BACKPACKS LARGER THAN 14 INCHES SQUARE, GLASS BOTTLES, CANS AND THERMOSES BROKEN FACTORY SEALED BEVERAGE CONTAINERS LARGER THAN 1 LITER, ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES, HARD AND SOFT SIDED COOLERS, BROOMS, POLES AND STICKS, BEACH BALLS AND INFLATABLES, BASEBALL BATS, BANNERS, SIGNS AND FLAGS, USE OF LASER POINTERS, NOISEMAKERS, MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS, WHISTLES, AIR HORNS AND BOOMBOXES, FIREWORKS/FIRECRACKERS, PETS (EXCEPTION: SERVICE ANIMALS FOR THE DISABLED THAT ARE IN SERVICE), WRAPPED PACKAGES. NO BEER SALES IN LEFT FIELD PAVILION. SMOKING IN DESIGNATED AREAS ONLY. TAILGATING IS PROHIBITED.
